name: Order Management
summary: Handles the complete order lifecycle including creation, validation, and cancellation.

flows.name: Create Order
flows.summary: Customer submits a new order through the REST API

steps.name: Validate Input
steps.description: Validates order request parameters and business rules before persistence

steps.name: Submit Order
steps.description: Persists the order and delegates payment to PaymentFacade RPC

steps.name: Return Response
steps.description: Returns order confirmation payload to the API caller

flows.name: Cancel Order
flows.summary: Cancels an existing order before it enters fulfillment

steps.name: Lookup Order
steps.description: Finds the order record by identifier from the data store

steps.name: Mark Cancelled
steps.description: Updates order status to cancelled and emits domain events
